## Related Issue

## Type
- [ ] feat — new functionality
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] docs — documentation only
- [ ] chore — tooling, deps, config
- [ ] test — tests only
- [ ] refactor — no behavior change

## Checklist
- [ ] `ruff check . && ruff format .` passes
- [ ] `mypy src/` passes
- [ ] `pytest` passes
- [ ] New behavior is tested
- [ ] CLAUDE.md updated if architecture changed
